[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010010 3
1 01011111 6
2 10110101 5
3 11000001 3
4 10110101 5
5 11100011 5
6 00000000 a
7 10101111 6

01 10 11010100 4
12 21 00101001 3
23 32 00001101 3
34 43 11101010 5
45 54 01110100 4
56 65 01110100 4
67 76 01010110 4
70 07 01001100 3

02 20 11111101 7
13 31 00100100 2
24 42 11100111 6
35 53 10011110 5
46 64 00000000 a match 6
57 75 00100010 2
60 06 00011010 3
71 17 10011000 3

36 63 11101010 5

50 05 01101110 5
61 16 11001110 5
72 27 10110001 4
